rationale.R1.4: The abstract mentions comparing to existing benchmarks (DAVIS and KIBA) but doesn't explicitly name or contrast them in detail.
rationale.R1.7: There is no mention of missing citations or incorrect citations.
rationale.RX.1: The abstract does not explicitly state uncertainty about any claims, though it does highlight the potential for generalization failures.
rationale.RX.3: The abstract describes a specific train/test split strategy designed to cover different aspects of the data, suggesting adherence to the requested scope.
rationale.RX.4: No mention of introducing new errors or harmful content is made.
rationale.RX.5: There is no discussion of source attribution for the curated dataset or the retrained models.
